Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 08/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E51
Magic Barrier Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, all movement restricting effects, stun, freeze, and petrification are removed from the unit, and they become immune to them for 2 / 2.5 / 3 / 3.5 / 4 / 4.5 / 5 sec.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, all movement restricting effects, stun, freeze, and petrification are removed from the unit, and they become immune to them for 2.5 / 3 / 3.5 / 4 / 4.5 / 5 / 5.5 sec. They also gain a shield that blocks 117600 / 168000 / 240000 / 320000 / 400000 / 500000 / 650000 of any damage. The shield lasts up to 2.5 / 3 / 3.5 / 4 / 4.5 / 5 / 5.5 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, all movement restricting effects, stun, freeze, and petrification are removed from the unit, and they become immune to them for 3 / 3.5 / 4 / 4.5 / 5 / 5.5 / 6 sec. They also gain a shield that blocks 164600 / 235200 / 336000 / 448000 / 560000 / 700000 / 900000 of any damage. The shield lasts up to 3 / 3.5 / 4 / 4.5 / 5 / 5.5 / 6 sec. When the shield runs out or gets destroyed, it explodes and deals 82300 / 117600 / 168000 / 224000 / 280000 / 350000 / 450000 pure damage to all enemy units. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.
